test_result.details: High hapax ratio (70.1%) contradicts coherent narrative hypothesis; although Zipf exponent (0.8946) shows natural language structure, the exceptionally high proportion of unique words appearing once suggests artificial construction, encoding, or fragmented rather than cohesive text.
